ac_results.name: Retention dry-run reports counts without mutating data
Retention deletion writes tombstones for KYC 7y expiry
Retention preserves daily telemetry summaries indefinitely

notes: Daily-summary preservation modelled via borrower_risk_scores: it is the CDS daily rollup table that this codebase has, so AC3 seeds a 4y-old row there and asserts it survives the sweep while a 3y-old telemetry_ingestion_log row is purged.
Telemetry deletion writes ONE batch tombstone with row_count rather than one tombstone per event — DPDPA accountability is preserved without exploding the audit table for IoT volume.
Admin-role gate uses the same `resolveActor` idiom as E-082; allowed roles: admin, nbfc_admin, nbfc_compliance_officer.
